summary: Vocabulary & Grammar Course with Question Bank integration testing completed. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages working correctly after fixing band level ID mismatch. Fixed evaluate endpoint to accept proper request body format.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed BAND_LEVELS in VocabGrammarCourse.js - changed 'beginner'/'intermediate' to 'foundation'/'development' to match backend data
Fixed /api/question-bank/grammar-vocab/evaluate endpoint - added GrammarVocabEvaluateRequest Pydantic model to properly parse request body with answers and user_id fields
Course data verified: 30 units (14 foundation, 8 development, 8 advanced), 255 items total, 90 quiz questions
All 3 band levels have both vocabulary and grammar content
Quiz evaluation correctly returns score, correct/incorrect answers, explanations, and weak areas
seed_data_creation: None - Using existing seeded vocab_grammar_lessons and vocab_grammar_quizzes collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vocabulary & Grammar Course fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/vocab-grammar/lessons (30 units, 255 items), GET /api/question-bank/grammar-vocab/quizzes (90 quizzes), GET /api/question-bank/grammar-vocab/units (grouped by band), POST /api/question-bank/grammar-vocab/evaluate (quiz evaluation). Frontend: VocabGrammarCourse.js shows band selection, lessons list, lesson detail with vocabulary/grammar items. VocabGrammarQuiz.js shows quiz interface with band filters, questions, answer checking, and explanations.

vocab_grammar_lessons_api.details: Returns 30 units with 255 items total. Supports band_level filter (foundation/development/advanced).

question_bank_quizzes_api.details: Returns 90 quiz questions. Supports band_level filter, limit, and random_order parameters.

question_bank_units_api.details: Returns units grouped by band level: foundation (14), development (8), advanced (8).

quiz_evaluate_api.details: Evaluates quiz answers, returns score, correct/incorrect results, explanations, and weak areas.

vocab_grammar_course_page.details: Band selection, lessons list (14 lessons for foundation), lesson detail with vocabulary word, IPA, definition, examples, collocations, IELTS tips, Listen to Pronunciation button, practice modes (Flashcards, Quiz).

vocab_grammar_quiz_page.details: Quiz interface with band level filters, progress indicator, quiz questions with multiple choice options, Check Answer button, explanations after answering, Next Question navigation, link to course.

fixes_applied.issue: BAND_LEVELS used 'beginner'/'intermediate' IDs but backend uses 'foundation'/'development'
fixes_applied.fix: Changed BAND_LEVELS IDs to match backend: beginner→foundation, intermediate→development

fixes_applied.issue: evaluate_grammar_vocab_quiz endpoint expected Dict[str, str] directly but frontend sends {answers: {...}, user_id: ...}
fixes_applied.fix: Added GrammarVocabEvaluateRequest Pydantic model to properly parse request body
